prompt: Add InLoopBack0 and IPv4 loopback direct routes
note: Added built-in VVRP InLoopBack0 IFNET interface, IP-owned 127.0.0.1/8 address state, and RM generation of both 127.0.0.0/8 and 127.0.0.1/32 Direct routes. FIB sync now carries loopback forwarding entries alongside Ethernet connected routes.
